answerkey-short-detail: Download Official SSC CGL Answer Key 2026 and Raise Objection Online.
faq-one: When was SSC CGL Answer Key released?
faq-one-ans: SSC CGL Answer Key was released in January 2027.
faq-two-ans: Yes, candidates can raise objections before the last date.
faq-three-ans: Yes, objection fee may be applicable as per SSC rules.
